questions.question: Explain the difference between IPv4 Datagram and IPv4 Address. Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the scope of each and how they are used in packet switching.

questions.question: Describe the process of packet switching and how it relates to the Network Layer of the OSI model. Be sure to include the role of IP addresses in packet switching.
questions.hint: Outline the key steps involved in packet switching, including fragmentation, routing, and reassembly.

questions.question: An IPv4 Datagram has a source IP address, destination IP address, and a header with protocol number 74. What is the protocol number 74 in the IPv4 Datagram header, and what does it signify?
questions.hint: Look up the value of protocol number 74 and explain its significance in the context of the Internet Protocol (IP).
